caveats: commands.test.ts 'weekly with notify_channel set prints Slack payload' exercises CLI default-mode in an env that passes cleanEnv() (empty GITHUB_TOKEN). No real network egress is possible in the test run.

weekly.test.ts atomic-write simulation uses 'make target path a directory' to force rename failure rather than mocking fs.renameSync, because vitest cannot redefine read-only fs exports under bun's resolver. Still verifies the key invariant: partial data never clobbers the committed file.

RulesFileSchema remains non-strict (.passthrough() implicit). Tester 🟡#3 said 'pick strict or passthrough' — I added a test documenting the current passthrough behavior. Flipping to strict is a schema-package concern and out of scope for U10.
Tester 🔵 / Backend 🔵 items intentionally skipped per U10 spec.
